task_text: Acme Robotics asked to move the next follow-up to 2026-10-13. Fix the follow-up date regression and keep the diff focused. Audit context is in docs/follow-up-audit.json.

next_step.current_state: Need perform mandatory identity bootstrap before task work.
next_step.observation: No tools run yet in this session.

next_step.current_state: Tree succeeded; must continue bootstrap sequence.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Inspect audit file and target record

plan_remaining_steps_brief: Update required records with focused diff
next_step.observation: Read AGENTS.md and found rule to update both reminder and owning account when rescheduling follow-up.

next_step.current_state: Identity bootstrap complete (tree, AGENTS, context). Now need locate regression details from audit file.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Apply minimal edits and report completion

next_step.current_state: Audit file identifies acct_002 and requested date. Need find owning reminder record and current follow-up fields.
next_step.observation: Read docs/follow-up-audit.json showing account_id acct_002 and requested_due_on 2026-10-13.

next_step.current_state: Account has outdated next_follow_up_on 2026-10-09; need corresponding reminder to satisfy rule updating both records.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write minimal date updates to reminder and account
next_step.observation: Read accounts/acct_002.json and found next_follow_up_on currently set to 2026-10-09.

next_step.current_state: Located linked reminder path; need verify its due date before patching.
next_step.observation: Search in /reminders found one linked record: reminders/rem_002.json.

next_step.current_state: All required evidence gathered; proceeding with minimal two-file patch per rulebook.
next_step.observation: Read reminders/rem_002.json and confirmed due_on is 2026-10-09, matching the regression.

}

next_step.current_state: Both required records now updated to requested follow-up date with minimal field-only diffs.

function.message: Done — fixed the follow-up date regression for Acme Robotics by updating both linked records to 2026-10-13, keeping the changes focused to the date fields only.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied AGENTS.md rule: when rescheduling follow-up work, update both reminder and owning account if both carry the date. Kept diffs focused and ID-stable.
function.outcome_justification: Audit file docs/follow-up-audit.json requested_due_on=2026-10-13 for account_id acct_002. Existing values were 2026-10-09 in accounts/acct_002.json (next_follow_up_on) and reminders/rem_002.json (due_on). Updated both to 2026-10-13.
